member.name: T:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA
member.summary: Class for Creating a Network connection to a SMA enabled scale indicator

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new connection to the scale
member.param: The IP address of the scale
The Port Number of the Address

member.name: E:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleDataRecieved
member.summary: Called when Scale Data is recieved

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.OnScaleDataRecieved
member.summary: The event handeler that is called when Data from the scale Is Recieved call get the scale data by checking the CurrentScaleData

member.name: E:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleConnecting
member.summary: Called when Scale is Connecting

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.OnScaleConnecting
member.summary: The event handeler that is called when Data from the scale Is Recieved call get the scale data by checking the CurrentScaleData

member.name: E:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleConnected
member.summary: Called when Scale is Connected

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.OnScaleConnected
member.summary: The event handeler that is called when Data from the scale Is Recieved call get the scale data by checking the CurrentScaleData

member.name: E:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleDisconnected
member.summary: Called when Scale is Disconnected

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.OnScaleDisconnected
member.summary: The event handeler that is called when Connection to the scale is broken call get the scale data by checking the CurrentScaleData

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.Interval
member.summary: The INterval in which the scale is updated

member.name: T:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.enumConnectionStatus
member.summary: The Network Connection Status of the scale

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.enumConnectionStatus.Ok
member.summary: Scale Is Connected

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.enumConnectionStatus.Connecting
member.summary: Scale Is Not Connected But is trying to Connect

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.enumConnectionStatus.NotConnected
member.summary: Scale is Not Connected

member.name: P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.CurrentScaleData
member.summary: Gets the current Scale Data Recieved from the indicator

member.name: P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.IsRunning
member.summary: True if the connection is running

member.name: P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ConnectionStatus
member.summary: Gets the status of the Scale Network Connection

member.name: P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ConnectionStatusString
member.summary: Gets a Text status of the connection

member.name: T:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData
member.summary: Class containg all the current Data Comming from the scale

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.Motion
member.summary: return true if the scale is in motion ( Unstable)

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.OK
member.summary: Everything is Ok

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.Under
member.summary: Scale is Underrange

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.Over
member.summary: Scale is OverRange

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.Fail
member.summary: Scale is in a faulted State

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.Connecting
member.summary: Scale is Trying to connect

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.enumStatus.Disconnected
member.summary: Scale is Disconnected

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.CurrentStatus
member.summary: The current status of the scale

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.CurWeight
member.summary: The Current Weight of the scale

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.NumberofErrorsReadingWeight
member.summary: The number of times system was unable to read the weight from the scale consecutively.

member.name: F:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.InputStatus
member.summary: The current State of the inputs of the scale.

member.name: P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.CurrentStatusChar
member.summary: The Status Character to be sent to the application. If the character is blank then the connection is not present

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.#ctor
member.summary: Class for holding the current scale infoemation

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.ResetScaleData
P:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ScaleData.RawWeightString
member.summary: The Last String Of Information comming from the scale just as it was recieved

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.SetOutputState(System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Turns Relays (1-3) On or Off (True or False)

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.SetAllOutputs(System.Int32)
member.summary: Sets the states of all output relays at once

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.ZeroScale
member.summary: Zeros the scale

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.Stop
member.summary: Stops and closes the connection

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.Start(System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts a connection to the indicator
member.param: The Rate in milliseconds that the scale is poled for the weight

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.Connect(System.Int32)
member.summary: Starts a connection to the indicator
member.param: The Rate in milliseconds that the scale is poled for the weight

member.name: M:SMA_Command_LIB.SMA.Disconnect
member.summary: Stops and closes the connection
